zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Beaumont Gatinais於1221年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦波奧蒙吉素爾-瓦時，她的父親Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble31歲，母親Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble26歲。她和Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme至少有7個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1275年4月10日在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年54歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Beaumont Gatinais于1221年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦波奧蒙吉素爾-瓦时，她的父亲Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble31岁，母亲Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble26岁。她和Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme至少有7个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1275年4月10日在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年54岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Beaumont Gatinais was born in 1221, in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, her father, Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble, was 31 and her mother, Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, was 26. She had at least 7 sons and 6 daughters with Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. She died on 10 April 1275, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Harcourt, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Beaumont Gatinais est née en 1221, à Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles avec Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1275, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Beaumont Gatinais 1221 in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble 31 und ihre Mutter Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble 26. Sie hatte mit Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1275 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Beaumont Gatinais è nata il nel 1221 nel Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie con Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. Morì il 10 aprile 1275, nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Beaumont Gatinaisが1221年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼビーウモント-スル-オイゼで生まれた時，父Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemombleは31歳，母Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemombleは26歳であった。彼女はJean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Hommeとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1275年4月10日にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで54歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアハーコウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Beaumont Gatinais(이)가 1221년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 보몽-수-이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 4월 10일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Beaumont Gatinais nasceu em 1221, em Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas com Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1275, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Beaumont Gatinais родилась в 1221 г. в местности бомонт-сур-оис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. Она умерла 10 апреля 1275 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности харкоурт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Beaumont Gatinais nació en 1221, en Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alix de Mauvoisin Dame de Villemomble, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas con Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme. Murió el 10 de abril de 1275, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
